pageContext.name: Hi-V Gundam (Metal Build)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Bandai are excited to present the Hi-V Gundam (Metal Build) Collectible Figure!  As seen in the 1988 novelization 'Char's Counterattack: Beltorchika's Children,' the Hi-Nu Gundam as envisioned by Yutaka Izubuchi joins the Metal Build series, redesigned and updated for even more dramatic impact.  Be sure to add this Hi-V Metal Build figure to your Gundam collection!
